title: Peppery Creamy Saudi-Arabian Rolled Oats Grill
description: A flavorful and comforting dish featuring rolled oats, peppers, and a creamy sauce, perfect for a weeknight meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the red and yellow bell peppers and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the rolled oats and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Add the heavy cream and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the oats have absorbed most of the liquid and the mixture has thickened, about 10 minutes.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the grill and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the oats are lightly toasted.
Serve hot and garnish with additional black pepper, if desired.
